name: Bow of the Elvenkind
description: This +2 distance seeking composite longbow was crafted by elven masters. Its range increment is doubled, and arrows fired from it ignore the miss chance from concealment (though not total concealment). The bow also grants a +2 competence bonus on Hide checks while held.

name: Crossbow of Speed
special_properties: Speed (one extra attack per round at highest attack bonus)
Rapid Reload (can reload as free action)
description: This +2 speed heavy crossbow can be reloaded as a free action, negating the usual full-round reload time. The speed property additionally grants one extra attack per round at the wielder's highest attack bonus in a full attack.

name: Javelin of Lightning
special_properties: On-hit: 5d6 lightning to all in line from thrower to target (DC 14 Reflex half, 1/day)
description: This +1 javelin becomes a bolt of lightning when thrown. Once per day, when thrown, it deals its normal damage plus creates a line of lightning from the thrower to the target dealing 5d6 electricity damage to all in the line (DC 14 Reflex half). After use, the javelin reappears in the thrower's hand.

name: Shuriken of Returning
description: This +2 keen returning shuriken is a favored weapon of high-level monks. It returns to the thrower's hand after each attack, effectively making it inexhaustible. Its keen edge extends its critical threat range to 19-20.

name: Sling of Seeking
special_properties: Flaming Burst (1d6 fire on hit, 1d10 extra on crit)
description: This +2 seeking flaming burst sling fires bullets that unerringly find their target through concealment and burst into flame on a critical hit. It ignores miss chances from concealment (but not total concealment) and deals 1d6 extra fire damage on every hit.
